name: Longan
summary: It should be framed as a food-like fruit botanical with modest modern evidence.
description: It should be framed as a food-like fruit botanical with modest modern evidence.
safetyNotes: CNS-active potential; avoid stacking with sedatives, alcohol, sleep aids, antidepressants, or other psychoactive supplements without clinician review. Avoid pregnancy/breastfeeding use unless supervised.
interactions: Potential interaction concern with sedatives/CNS depressants
use clinician review for high-dose extracts or chronic use.

sources.title: Recent chemical synthesis of plant polysaccharides
Genome-wide high-throughput chromosome conformation capture analysis reveals hierarchical chromatin interactions during early somatic embryogenesis
Pericarp and seed of litchi and longan fruits: constituent, extraction, bioactive activity, and potential utilization

dosage: Preparation-specific; use standardized product label for Fruit/berry preparations are commonly used as foods and require source-backed dosage review before therapeutic claims.
typical_dosage: Preparation-specific; use standardized product label for Fruit/berry preparations are commonly used as foods and require source-backed dosage review before therapeutic claims.
